mapper.update: UPDATE `project_contract` SET `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `contract_code` = #{contractCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `contract_name` = #{contractName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `contract_amount` = #{contractAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `contract_start_date` = #{contractStartDate, jdbcType=DATE}, `contract_end_date` = #{contractEndDate, jdbcType=DATE}, `seal_status` = #{sealStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `submitted_at` = #{submittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `signed_at` = #{signedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `archived_at` = #{archivedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `contract_id` = #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
